text:
was a horse ridden by Dieter Ness during his career as a member of the Scout Regiment.

Appearance

Like the majority of specially bred Scout Regiment horses, Charrette was tall in stature with a light brown coat of hair and a dark brown mane.

Story

The 57th Exterior Scouting Mission arc

Upon their induction into the Scout Regiment, Dieter Ness introduces himself and Charrette to the new recruits.

During the 57th Exterior Scouting Mission, Ness is astride Charrette when he encounters an abnormal Titan in a field. After killing it, Charrette returns to him unprompted, much to his joy.

Almost immediately after, they encounter the Female Titan. When Ness attempts to kill the Female and is killed, Charlotte is left riderless to wander the wilderness beyond Wall Rose.

Legacy

War for Paradis arc

When Hange sacrifices their life to ensure their comrades' escape from the Rumbling in Odiha, Charrette is among the souls of fallen Scouts to welcome them in death.

Abilities

Speed - As a horse specially bred for use in the Scout Regiment, Charrette had a top speed of .

Endurance - Charrette could maintain a constant speed of . Due to her staunch legs, she was capable of withstanding the stress of sudden stops, acceleration, and circling.

Temperament - Charrette was quite docile and did not normally frighten in the presence of Titans. The nearly constant sound of ODM gear being used so close to her also seemed to have no effect on her.

Trivia

Charrette is the first animal with a known name to appear in the anime.
